title: RUNNER_CONTRACT
description: Top-level runner invocation contract. Defines the interface between the dispatcher and the runner. The runner reads this contract to know what to execute, what is allowed, and when to stop.

runner_id.description: Unique identifier for this runner instance.

mode.description: Runner execution mode. run_until_terminal is the default: continue until terminal=true.

input_outcome_path.description: Path to the FLOW_OUTCOME.json that triggered this run.

input_taskspec_path.description: Path to the TASKSPEC.json to execute. REQUIRED when terminal=false unless next_action is set.

terminal.description: Is this bounded runner invocation terminal? If false, the runner MUST continue executing its declared next actions.

next_action.description: Concrete next action the runner must perform. REQUIRED when terminal=false and no input_taskspec_path.

next_task_spec_path.description: Path to the next TaskSpec to consume after current execution.

allowed_actions.description: Actions the runner is allowed to perform. Must be explicit.

forbidden_actions.description: Actions the runner MUST NOT perform. Min includes: delete, move, rename, clean_worktree, overwrite_evidence, fabricate_baseline, fabricate_attestation.

max_steps.description: Maximum steps before requiring human intervention.

max_rounds.description: Maximum review rounds before requiring human intervention.

resume_policy.description: Resume policy: where state is stored for recovery.

safety_policy.description: Safety constraints for this runner instance.

required_outputs.description: Minimum output files the runner must produce. Must include FLOW_OUTCOME.json and RUNNER_STATE.json.
